data.title: President Trump to Announce Crypto Policy at Digital Asset Summit
data.description:
President Trump will address the Digital Asset Summit, revealing new U.S. crypto policies and announcing a strategic Bitcoin reserve.
source: https://coincu.com/327474-trump-digital-asset-summit

data.title: Federal Reserve Raises Inflation Forecasts Amid Economic Shifts
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve's economic outlook has undergone significant changes, yet interest rate expectations have not fully adjusted to these shifts, raising the threshold for potential rate cuts. Federal Reserve officials have consecutively increased the core PCE inflation forecast, moving from 2.2% in September 2023 to 2.5% in December 2023, and further to 2.8% by March 2024, with projections extending to the end of 2025. Some officials have even raised their inflation forecasts for 2026 and 2027. Among 19 officials, 18 perceive inflation risks as tilted to the upside, suggesting that the Federal Reserve might require a notable weakening in the labor market before considering rate cuts.

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell attributed the upward revision in inflation forecasts "almost entirely" to changes in trade policy. Former Federal Reserve officials believe that the institution may find it challenging to overlook the inflationary pressures caused by tariffs and might wait for more evidence of economic slowdown before taking action.

data.title: A whale recharged $7.37 million USDC to HyperLiquid within 16 hours and bought 400,000 HYPE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Chain analyst @OnchainLens monitored that in the past 16 hours, a whale recharged $7.37 million USDC to HyperLiquid, of which $5.94 million was used to buy 400,059 HYPEs at an average price of about $14.85.
Currently, the whale wallet still holds $1.42 million USDC, which may be used to continue to increase HYPE positions.

data.title: AscendEX will launch ReNew (RENEW)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch ReNew (RENEW) at 14:00 on March 20, opening the RENEW/USDT trading pair, and is now open for deposits.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is the first and most comprehensive trading platform for Memecoin on the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background. The platform's Memecoin first launch rate is as high as 80%. Trade Memecoin on AscendEX.

data.title: SHELL market maker repurchase progress reached 74%, and the repurchase address balance increased to 19.95 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that the balance of the SHELL market maker's public repurchase address has grown to 19.95 million SHELL, with an estimated value of $5.92 million at the proposed price, and the repurchase progress has reached 74%. The most recent repurchase occurred 11 hours ago.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose, with PayFi leading the way with an increase of 8.95%, and BTC breaking through $87,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, the crypto market sectors rose across the board, with the PayFi sector leading the rise by 8.95%. Within the sector, XRP rose 9.91% in 24 hours, and Telcoin (TEL) rose 15.30%, affected by factors such as the SEC's withdrawal of the lawsuit against Ripple Labs. In addition, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 3.71% in 24 hours, rebounding above $87,000, and Ethereum (ETH) rose 5.25%, breaking through the $2,000 mark.
It is worth noting that MAG7.ssi rose 4.73%, DEFI.ssi rose 6.22%, and MEME.ssi rose 5.02%.
In other sectors, the AI ​​sector rose 5.72% in 24 hours, and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN), Arkham (ARKM), and Delysium (AGI) rose 25.53%, 11.84%, and 35.71% respectively; the Meme sector rose 4.94%, among which Dogecoin (DOGE) rose 5.11%; the DeFi sector rose 4.39%, and within the sector, Chainlink (LINK) rose 6.58%, and Uniswap (UNI) rose 7.05%; the Layer2 sector rose 3.10%, and the Layer1 sector rose 2.56%, among which Solana (SOL) rose 7.05%; the CeFi sector rose 1.17%.
At the same time, the crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market conditions of the sector, shows that the ssiPayFi, ssiDeFi, and ssiAI indices have risen the most in 24 hours, up 9.06%, 5.74%, and 4.79% respectively, and the weekly returns have reached 10.11%, 12.13%, and 9.39% respectively.

data.title: The Fed has raised the bar for rate cuts, and inflation expectations have been raised twice in a row
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily reported that Nick Timiraos, a mouthpiece for the Federal Reserve, wrote that the Federal Reserve's economic expectations have changed significantly, but interest rate expectations have not fully reflected this change, and the threshold for interest rate cuts is rising.
Federal Reserve officials have raised their core PCE inflation expectations twice in a row, from 2.2% in September 2023 to 2.5% in December 2023, and then to 2.8% in March 2024 (forecast for the end of 2025). Some officials have even raised their inflation expectations for 2026 and 2027. In addition, 18 of 19 officials saw inflation risks as skewed to the upside, meaning the Fed would likely need to see a notable weakening in the labor market before considering a rate cut.
Federal Reserve Chairman Powell said the upward revision in inflation expectations was driven "almost entirely" by changes in trade policy, and former Fed officials believed that it may be difficult for the Fed to ignore the upward price pressure caused by tariffs, and they may need to wait until more evidence of slowing economic growth emerges before taking action.

data.description:
.S. president has ever joined a crypto conference. Just recently, Donald Trump hosted the inaugural White House Crypto Summit
source: https://coinpedia.org/uncategorized/trump-to-speak-at-first-ever-crypto-summit-as-market-shows-signs-of-recovery/

data.title: Hyperliquid plans to adjust the fee system after April 30 and introduce a staking tier system
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hyperliquid announced that it will adjust the fee system on or after April 30, 2025, and introduce staking tiers. Under the new rules, users who stake HYPE tokens can enjoy lower transaction fees, up to 40% discount. In addition, the spot and contract markets will adopt independent fee systems, and the weight will be doubled when calculating spot trading volume to improve the fairness of fee calculation.
After the adjustment, the default fee rate has increased, the contract taker fee rate has increased from 0.035% to 0.045%, and the spot taker fee rate has doubled from 0.035% to 0.07%. Officials said that this move is aimed at increasing protocol revenue and enhancing the practicality of HYPE.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins CEO: The income from staking ETH through the Fat Penguin NFT is better than directly staking ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Pudgy Penguins CEO Luca Netz posted on X platform that holding Pudgy Penguin NFT is the best way to hold ETH. Since its inception, the return value of Pudgy Penguin NFT has far exceeded staking ETH. Long story short, if you want to maximize the value of your ETH holdings, then use Pudgy Penguin NFT to stake your ETH.
